context: Tests whether the agent uses exitOverride() in test setup to prevent process.exit during tests, uses choices() for enum option validation, uses parseAsync with await, defines a TypeScript interface for options, and uses kebab-case flag names.

checklist.name: exitOverride() in test setup
checklist.description: The test setup (or test program factory) calls program.exitOverride() so that Commander throws instead of calling process.exit during tests

checklist.name: choices() for format option
checklist.description: The --format option uses .choices() or new Option(...).choices([...]) to enforce the pdf/csv/html constraint

checklist.name: Invalid format test
checklist.description: At least one test verifies that an invalid --format value causes an error (either a thrown exception or a rejected promise)

checklist.name: parseAsync with await in tests
checklist.description: In cli.test.ts, all calls to parseAsync are awaited (not fire-and-forget)

checklist.name: TypeScript interface for options
checklist.description: A TypeScript interface or type is defined for the generate command's options in cli.ts

checklist.name: kebab-case flags
checklist.description: Multi-word options use kebab-case in their flag definition in cli.ts (--output-dir not --outputDir)

checklist.name: Defaults test
checklist.description: At least one test invokes the command without optional arguments and asserts that defaults are applied

checklist.name: try/catch in action handler
checklist.description: The action handler in cli.ts wraps its logic in a try/catch block

checklist.name: Typed options to service
checklist.description: The action handler passes the complete options object to the service function, not individual properties
